title: Alger AI Enablers & Adopters ETF (NYSEARCA:ALAI) Short Interest Up 235.9% in March
description: Alger AI Enablers & Adopters ETF (NYSEARCA:ALAI – Get Free Report) was the target of a large growth in short interest in the month of March. As of March 13th, there was short interest totaling 56,683 shares, a growth of 235.9% from the February 26th total of 16,873 shares. Approximately 0.7% of the company’s stock [...]
